summary: Highly praised recording and performance, hailed as the greatest Grateful Dead capture on the Archives.
review: The lone review rates this 44‑minute show a perfect five stars, calling it both the greatest recording and performance in the archive. While no technical details are given, the reviewer’s enthusiasm suggests an exceptional listening experience despite the unknown source type.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review overwhelmingly praises both the performance and recording, but with only one data point and no specifics on audio source, confidence remains low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it the "greatest recording" but provides no concrete details about soundboard vs. audience or clarity.
